title: lastrea obtusifolia
intro: Lastrea obtusifolia, also known as the obtuse lastrea fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lastrea obtusifolia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antidote for snake bites. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, decoctions, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
